title: read-ci-workflows — output
description: Typed enumeration of CI workflow files discovered under the repo root. Empty `workflows` list is a legitimate state — many consumers have no CI yet.

workflows.description: One entry per discovered workflow file. Sorted by path for deterministic ordering across re-runs (NFR-003).

path.description: Repo-relative path to the workflow file (e.g. `.github/workflows/branch-ci.yml`).

name.description: The workflow's declared `name:` field; null when absent.

triggers.description: List of declared `on:` trigger event names (e.g. ['push', 'pull_request']). Empty list if `on:` is absent or malformed.
